statement: HELM is a VERIFIED, OPERATIONAL, GOVERNED Executive Operating System: the constitutional baseline is ratified, the implementation is independently verified as conformant, all HELM subsystems pass end-to-end System Integration testing, and the Executive Command Center operates as the single interface over a runtime that coordinates frontier and local models under governance.
note: This is the PLATFORM goal (operable governed OS). First settled revenue dollar is a separate, externally-gated milestone tracked under external_milestones (Stripe settlement).

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Constitution v1.0 RATIFIED; changes only via EDR
HELM platform passes System Integration testing
acceptance_criteria.measure: HELM SI suite green (target: all pass)
Grok verdict artifact vs frozen target d8d5139a

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Executive Command Center is the single interface
Provider dispatch enabled (frontier + local) under governance
acceptance_criteria.measure: founder credentials supplied; adapters live; fail-closed until then

doctrine: No fake green. A criterion is DONE only on authoritative evidence; PARTIAL and PENDING are reported honestly.
